positive: Minimalist, geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains are rendered in deep sapphire blue and charcoal black, contrasted against a gradient sky of soft coral and pale gold. The design should be centered and symmetrical, making it suitable for screen printing on a t-shirt. Add small, stylized abstract geometric constellations and crescent moons floating above the peaks. Clean vector line art influence, highly detailed pattern repetition around the central image for filling space, high contrast, flat graphic design style, symmetrical composition, clean edges, vector art, merchandise design, print-ready illustration.
